seoTitle: Durren Durren vs Duval — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Durren Durren vs Duval: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durren Durren and Duval.
heading: Durren Durren vs Duval — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durren Durren, New South Wales and Duval, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durren Durren has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Duval (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durren Durren or Duval safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durren Durren has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Duval scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durren Durren scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Duval scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durren Durren or Duval?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durren Durren has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
